acaseofthegolf1.text: @TradeCNBC @NUCLRGOLF @Skratch @Robopz I think if you play the qualifier at all, then best bet is to play it out. I would have totally understood if he skipped Q totally and went to get ready for Belgium.

@HoodieUce What helps him? Going to Belgium? Yes, a day later and a spot in the U.S. Open (and the DP points that come with it if he made the cut) would have helped him get his pga tour card way more potentially. Of course they can have their opinion and respect it. But I won’t agree
@TradeCNBC @NUCLRGOLF @Skratch @Robopz If it was just for 2nd alt id def understand it.

@TradeCNBC @NUCLRGOLF @Skratch @Robopz can prob help on this. But I’d guess 1st alt at this site in its current form, got in 100% of the time. The only slot filled on the first hole was the guaranteed slot. Not sure how many holes, and if he was going to miss his flight, doesn’t really matter, one hole or
@scrub68 @NUCLRGOLF @Skratch Not true at this site. And first alternate is 100% going to be in the field.

@TradeCNBC @NUCLRGOLF @Skratch It’s isn’t really an alternate. If he got first alternate he would 100% be on the field. 2nd alternate has a chance to get in also. I disagree but respect your opinion. He could have taken flight Tuesday. Or why play if concentration is DP?
